arts.ttl: Yang tells all on the best part about playing for Celtic as in-form star reveals what is 'great honour'
arts.sum: Yang has been the ideal “super-sub” for Celtic in recent times but the wide man will likely be dying for starts in the coming weeks. Yang is pushing off-colour Nicolas Kuhn for a Celtic start

arts.ttl: What David Gray said about Celtic has Hibs boss sounding beaten already
arts.sum: The Easter Road outfit make the trip to Celtic Park tomorrow afternoon in the Scottish Cup tie where they will face the rampant Hoops who have scored 10 goals in just two matches against Aberdeen and St Mirren respectively. David Gray sounds nervous before Celtic vs Hibs in Scottish Cup

arts.ttl: Kyogo suffers Rennes indignity in PSG mauling as Celtic hero's transfer claim teeters on the brink

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou told by Tottenham hierarchy what is 'deeply concerning' as post-Celtic woes continue
arts.sum: It has been doom and gloom for Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham this season. The manager has been backed publicly by Spurs at times this season but it’s likely that he could be facing the axe if things don’t improve, and fast.

arts.ttl: The tactical battle facing Celtic as Hibernian revival comes up against ultimate test
arts.sum: Analyst Alan Morrison takes a close look at what Celtic can expect when Hibernian come calling in Sunday's big Scottish Cup clash at Celtic Park.
